# Legal Eagle Law Firm — Documentation

> Modern legal services platform for Pakistan, plus a multi-tenant
> practice-management SaaS for lawyers. This site documents how
> visitors, firm clients, lawyers (SaaS users), and firm staff use
> the Legal Eagle platform at legaleaglelaws.com.

The Legal Eagle Law Firm is the practice of **Advocate Maaz Ahmed Warriach**
(Lahore, Pakistan). The platform is built and maintained by **Ahsan Mahmood**
([aoneahsan.com](https://aoneahsan.com)).

This `llms.txt` file follows the [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org) format and
is a curated map for large language models and AI search engines.

## Key URLs

- App: <https://legaleaglelaws.com>
- Documentation: <https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com>
- Free consultation booking: <https://legaleaglelaws.com/free-consultation>
- AI legal assistant: in-app chatbot (lower-right corner of every page)
- Find a lawyer: <https://legaleaglelaws.com/legal-persons>
- Public lawyer profiles: `<https://legaleaglelaws.com/lawyer/:slug>`
- GitHub (this docs site): <https://github.com/aoneahsan/legaleaglelawfirm-docs>

## User Guide

- [Introduction](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/intro): What Legal Eagle is and who it's for.
- [Find a lawyer](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/visitors/find-a-lawyer): Browse the Punjab Bar Council directory of ~15,700 advocates.
- [Free consultation booking](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/visitors/free-consultation-booking): How a visitor books a Google Meet consultation with the firm.
- [AI legal assistant](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/visitors/ai-legal-assistant): Six-tier chatbot (cache → curated KB → LLM) for Pakistani-law questions.
- [Legal persons directory](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/visitors/legal-persons-directory): How the bar-voter search works and what data is shown.

## Firm clients

- [Dashboard overview](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/clients/dashboard-overview): What firm clients see when they sign in.
- [Your cases](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/clients/your-cases): Tracking matters the firm is handling for you.
- [Appointments](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/clients/appointments): Upcoming meetings, Google Meet links, reschedule/cancel.
- [Help requests](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/clients/help-requests): Send messages to the firm and track replies.
- [Profile and preferences](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/clients/profile-and-preferences): Theme, contact details, account.
- [Legal persons search](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/user-guide/clients/legal-persons-search): Searching the bar-voter directory from inside the dashboard.

## Architecture (high-level, public-safe)

- [Stack overview](https://docs.legaleaglelaws.com/docs/architecture/intro): React 19 + Radix UI + Tailwind v4 + Capacitor 8 + Firebase Firestore + Cloudflare Workers + Neon Postgres.

## Trust & contact

- Firm: Legal Eagle Law Firm, Office No. 3, 2nd Floor, Kareem Chamber 2, Mozang, Lahore 54000, Pakistan.
- Phone / WhatsApp: +92 339 0108134
- Email: info@legaleaglelaws.com (general), legallaw669@gmail.com (legal matters)
- Office hours: Mon–Sat, 9 AM – 6 PM PKT, plus 24/7 digital assistance.

## Author

Documentation, application, and SaaS platform built by **Ahsan Mahmood** —
full-stack engineer focused on React, Capacitor, and Firebase.
- Portfolio: <https://aoneahsan.com>
- LinkedIn: <https://linkedin.com/in/aoneahsan>
- GitHub: <https://github.com/aoneahsan>
- npm: <https://www.npmjs.com/~aoneahsan>
- Email: <mailto:aoneahsan@gmail.com>
